3284500.name: Fantasy Grounds - Seven Worlds Module 5: Chrysalis
3284500.description:
Seven Worlds Module 5: Chrysalis

The fifth adventure in the Seven Worlds RPG epic campaign!
After many grueling adventures the heroes finally reach Chrysalis, a bizarre place unknown to most humans. As the heroes attempt to overturn the political status quo, they discover the secret the leaders of this place have been working so hard to keep hidden: The existence of a weapon that could stop the Devourers once and for all!
This product requires the Savage Worlds rulebook and the Seven Worlds Setting Guide to play.  It contains separate modules tailored to work with both Savage Worlds Deluxe and Savage Worlds Adventure Edition versions of the underlying Setting Guide and core rulebook.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Alan Gober
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
